hero.headline: Websites, systems and e-commerce that turn digital presence into results.
hero.sub: MendeShift is a digital product studio: design and engineering under one roof. From briefing to launch, you talk directly to the person who builds.

services.title: What we deliver
services.lead: Four fronts of work — from institutional websites to complete digital products.

items.title: Websites & Landing Pages
items.desc: Institutional websites and high-converting landing pages — custom design, performance and SEO from day one.

items.title: Web Systems & SaaS
items.desc: Complete custom applications: dashboards, automations and integrations. Architecture built to grow with the business.

items.title: E-commerce
items.desc: Online stores with optimized checkout, PIX and card payments, and simple day-to-day management.

items.title: Design & Brand Identity
items.desc: Complete brand identity and interface in the same package as the website — your brand and product speaking the same language.

work.title: Selected Cases
work.lead: Real products in production — each case shows the client's problem, the solution built and the outcome delivered.

items.title: Direct Communication
items.description: You talk to the person building the project — no middle manager, no broken telephone. Every decision explained in plain language.
items.signal: Replies within 24 business hours, from first contact to post-launch.

items.title: Deadlines Are Commitments
items.description: Scope and schedule defined in writing before work starts. If something changes along the way, you hear it first — never after.
items.signal: Landing pages in 1–2 weeks; complete products in 4–8 weeks.

items.title: Auditable Quality
items.description: Automated tests, performance metrics and clean code in every project. Quality you can verify, not just take on faith.
items.signal: The studio's own website is the demonstration of the delivery standard.

items.title: End-to-End Delivery
items.description: From briefing to launch: design, development, deploy and support in one place. No layer is someone else's problem.
items.signal: A single person responsible for the whole project — context is never lost.

about.title: A digital studio with engineering at its core
about.p1: MendeShift is a digital product studio founded by José Luiz Mendes, software engineer. Here, design and code are not separate stages: the person who designs the solution is the one who builds it — no intermediaries, no loss of context.
about.p2: Every project starts from the business's real problem: what needs to generate results before any technology decision. That product mindset is what separates a pretty website from a website that sells.
about.p3: We work without shortcuts because the cost of technical debt always surfaces — in maintenance, in growth, in the next feature. What we deliver keeps working long after launch.
about.motivation_text: The studio was born from a real project: the complete platform for the founder's own wedding — RSVP, payments and gallery, running in production without failures. The same discipline goes into every client project.

signals.title: End-to-end delivery
signals.description: From briefing to deploy: design, development and operation as a single responsibility. No intermediary layers, no loss of context.

signals.title: Design + Engineering
signals.description: Beautiful interfaces and solid code are not opposites. Every project combines brand identity, user experience and architecture that can grow.

signals.title: No shortcuts, no surprises
signals.description: Every decision is justified and communicated. No hidden technical debt — what works at delivery keeps working in production.

profile_cards.title: Product end-to-end, no intermediaries
profile_cards.description: Design, development and delivery as a single responsibility. You talk directly to whoever makes the technical decisions — and knows the reason behind each one.

profile_cards.title: Disciplined execution, no technical theater
profile_cards.description: Clear scope, written schedule and verifiable quality. The solution needs to work under pressure, not just look good in a presentation.

profile_cards.title: Real engineering behind the design
profile_cards.description: Founded by a software engineer with production projects for the public and private sectors. The website you're looking at is proof of the standard.

process.title: From briefing to launch
process.lead: A clear six-step process — you know exactly where the project stands at every moment.

steps.title: Briefing
steps.desc: You share the goal, the audience and references. A quick form or a WhatsApp conversation.

steps.title: Proposal
steps.desc: Scope, timeline and investment in writing within 24 business hours. No fine print.

steps.title: Design
steps.desc: Identity and interface approved before any line of code. You validate every screen.

steps.title: Build
steps.desc: Development with constant progress updates — you watch the project take shape.

steps.title: Launch
steps.desc: Production deploy with domain, technical SEO, analytics and audited performance.

steps.title: Support
steps.desc: Post-launch follow-up, adjustments and continuous evolution as the business grows.

services_page.title: Studio services
services_page.lead: Websites, web systems, e-commerce and brand identity — based in Vitória, Brazil, working remotely worldwide. Clear scope, written timelines and a proposal within 24 business hours.

items.title: Websites & Landing Pages
items.desc: Professional institutional websites and landing pages, designed to convert visitors into leads. Exclusive design — no templates — with performance and technical SEO from day one.
deliverables: Technical SEO: metadata, sitemap and structured data
items.price: On request — proposal within 24 business hours

items.title: Web Systems & SaaS
items.desc: Complete custom web applications: admin dashboards, scheduling systems, automations and integrations with external APIs. Architecture built to grow with the business.
deliverables: Authentication, access roles and admin panel
Integrations with APIs, payments and external services
items.price: On request — scope defined after briefing

items.title: E-commerce
items.desc: Online stores with a fluid shopping experience: catalog, cart, optimized checkout and payments via PIX, card and boleto. Simple management for whoever runs the store day to day.
deliverables: Optimized checkout with PIX, card and boleto
Payment gateway integration (Mercado Pago and others)
items.price: On request — proposal within 24 business hours

items.title: Design & Brand Identity
items.desc: Complete brand identity integrated with your website or product: logo, palette, typography and design system. Brand and product speaking the same language, from business card to interface.
deliverables: Design system applied to the website/product
Source files delivered to the client
items.price: On request — bundles with a website get special conditions

items.q: How much does a website cost?
items.a: It depends on the scope: a landing page is a different investment from a complete e-commerce. After the briefing (5 minutes of your time), you get a fixed proposal within 24 business hours — with scope, timeline and price in writing, no surprises at the end.
Landing pages and institutional websites: 1 to 3 weeks. Web systems and e-commerce: 4 to 8 weeks. The schedule is defined in writing in the proposal and tracked with constant updates.
Usually 50% on proposal approval and 50% on delivery, via PIX or bank transfer. For larger projects, payment can be split by delivered milestone.

No. Every project gets an exclusive design, created from your business and approved by you before development. That's what separates a website that represents your brand from a website that looks like everyone else's.
Every project includes a post-launch support period for adjustments. After that, you can hire ongoing maintenance or evolve the project on demand — the code is yours.
Yes. The studio is based in Vitória, Brazil, but everything runs 100% remotely — briefing, approvals and meetings happen online.

contact_page.title: Tell us about your project
contact_page.lead: Fill in the briefing below and get a proposal within 24 business hours. Prefer to talk? Reach out directly on WhatsApp.

form.message_placeholder: What do you want to build? What's the goal? Any websites you like as references?
form.success_text: Thank you! You'll get a proposal within 24 business hours at the email provided. Want to speed things up?
form.error_text: We couldn't send it right now. You can try again or send the briefing directly via WhatsApp:
form.rate_limited: Too many submissions in a short time. Please wait a bit or reach out directly on WhatsApp.

validation.message_required: Tell us a bit about the project (at least 10 characters)

contact_page.direct_text: Prefer to skip the form? Talk to the studio now:

contact.availability: The studio is open to new projects. Ask questions in the chat, fill in the briefing or reach out directly on WhatsApp.
contact.initial_message: Hi! I'm the MendeShift assistant. Want to know about pricing, timelines or how a project works? Just ask.
contact.fallback_response: Thanks for your message! For a more detailed answer, fill in the briefing at /contato or reach out on WhatsApp.
contact.rate_limit_response: You've reached the message limit for now. Please try again later or reach out directly on WhatsApp or at josemendess004@gmail.com.

quick_prompts.label: How much is a website?
quick_prompts.prompt: How much does a website or landing page cost and how does the quote work?
quick_prompts.answer: The investment depends on the scope — a landing page is different from an e-commerce. After a quick briefing, you get a fixed proposal within 24 business hours, with scope, timeline and price in writing.

quick_prompts.label: What's the timeline?
quick_prompts.prompt: What is the average delivery timeline for a website, system or online store?
quick_prompts.answer: Landing pages and websites: 1 to 3 weeks. Web systems and e-commerce: 4 to 8 weeks. The schedule is defined in writing before work starts.

quick_prompts.label: Do you build e-commerce?
quick_prompts.prompt: Do you develop online stores with PIX and card payments?
quick_prompts.answer: Yes — complete stores with optimized checkout, PIX, card and boleto via gateways like Mercado Pago, plus a product and order management panel.

quick_prompts.label: How does it work?
quick_prompts.prompt: How does a project work, from first contact to delivery?
quick_prompts.answer: Six steps: briefing → proposal within 24 business hours → design approved by you → build with constant updates → full launch → post-delivery support.

colophon.title: Credits
colophon.lead: Visual system, stack and foundational decisions behind the interface. This website is the living demonstration of the studio's delivery standard.
colophon.build_text: A more editorial colophon, with blocks grouped by function. Reduces height on mobile and improves scannability without losing density.
colophon.contact_text: Direct channels for conversation, proposals or project follow-up.

experience_page.lead: The engineering experience behind the studio: production projects for the public and private sectors, with verifiable quality discipline.

experience_section.lead_experience: Software engineering in production, on strategic projects for the Espírito Santo State Government.
